message:
bd-3akdb.5: E2E test suite for IVM Incremental Views

18 integration tests covering full IVM pipeline: theme change (dark→light),
single-property work reduction, layout resize via FilteredListView, cascading
changes (theme+content), DAG topology and diamond patterns, cycle detection,
JSONL schema compliance, delta ratio validation across view sizes, multi-epoch
pipeline with evidence logging, fallback policy integration, large-scale stress
(10k widgets, 100 epochs), deduplication correctness, and trait object dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
